_comment: Manual category overrides, keyed by unified fund id (slug(manager)-slug(approach)). Value is one of the CATEGORY_BUCKETS in normalize.mjs. This is the human tuning knob applied BEFORE the keyword classifier (normalizePmsRecord/normalizeAifRecord) — use it for funds the name-based rules can't safely resolve: idiosyncratic names the regex would miss, or large marquee funds whose published mandate is unambiguous to a buy-side client. Add an entry only when confident; leave genuinely ambiguous brand-only names as the Multi/Flexi fallback. Curate by AUM (biggest funds matter most). PMS + AIF.
